message:
fix(core): resolve clippy warnings across subprocess-bridge + mcp feature combos

- descriptors.rs: remove unnecessary raw string hashes (r#"{}"# → r"{}")
- descriptors.rs: replace useless vec![...] with array literal in test
- runtime_compat.rs: replace match_wild_err_arm with .expect() in test
- mcp_types.rs: remove needless as_deref() on Option<&str> in test

All feature combos clean: default, subprocess-bridge, mcp+mcp-client+subprocess-bridge.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
